events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition: shoe off its support. Hangers & supports. Industrial piping. Shoe (pipe shoe) off its support means pipe shoe has disengaged from support structure/baseplate/saddle. Defective installed condition. Decision fail because non-compliant/support not functioning, risk high? Pipe shoe off support means load not transferred, pipe may be unsupported, potential for pipe movement, stress, failure. Need component_conditions includes installed-defective, maybe non-compliant. Work_stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 90? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty, workable empty. findings: pipe shoe disengaged from support; load path interrupted; potential for pipe sagging/stress. actions: reseat shoe on support, inspect alignment, anchor/restrain as per drawings, verify clearance and weld integrity, re-inspect. rationale. references: MSS SP-58, project support standards. Need valid JSON.

events.label: response

    "Pipe shoe is disengaged from its support base/saddle.",
    "Designed load path is interrupted; pipe is not properly supported.",
    "Visible misalignment between shoe and support member.",
    "Potential for pipe sag, excessive stress, or unintended movement."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately tag and isolate the area if pipe movement is possible.",
    "Reseat the pipe shoe fully on the support per engineered drawings.",
    "Check shoe alignment, weld integrity, and support elevation.",
    "Verify clearances, insulation continuity, and restraint requirements.",
    "Re-inspect and document before close-out."
  ],
  "rationale": "A pipe shoe that is off its support is an installed-defective, non-compliant support condition. It cannot safely transfer pipe loads as designed, creating a high risk of pipe stress, sag, or failure. The installation must be corrected and re-inspected.",
  "references": [
    "MSS SP-58 - Pipe Hangers and Supports - Materials, Design, Manufacture, Selection, Application, and Installation",
    "Project support standards and engineered hanger/support drawings"
  ]
}
